meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no design skills (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no design skills. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template Checklist
content.seo_description: Master the Antigravity project template to overcome design limitations. An advanced guide for freelancers to ship production-ready apps using Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template bridges the gap between engineering and aesthetics by leveraging pre-configured design systems and component libraries. By pairing this with Claude Code, you automate the UI layer, allowing you to ship high-fidelity SaaS products without needing manual design skills or external design tools.
content.intro:
The blank editor is a graveyard for ambitious ideas. For the freelancer, design paralysis isn't just an annoyance—it's a profit killer that keeps you tethered to low-margin tasks while your clients wait for prototypes that never arrive. You don't need a degree in UI/UX; you need a system that enforces professional visual standards by default.

Antigravity is that system. It treats your UI as code, enforcing strict design patterns that make every component look like it was polished by a senior designer. When combined with the raw speed of Claude Code, you stop building interfaces pixel-by-pixel and start architecting entire revenue-generating platforms in a single afternoon.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational directory structure and theme configuration to ensure consistent spacing and typography across your entire application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project using the Antigravity base template with Tailwind CSS and a professional, dark-mode-first aesthetic.

steps.title: Define Component Architecture
steps.description: Map out your core functional requirements into reusable atomic components to minimize redundancy and maximize development velocity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a library of atomic components including responsive navbars, pricing cards, and authentication forms using the Antigravity design system.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate components: Navbar, Hero, PricingGrid, Footer, AuthForm' --target ./components

steps.title: Implement State-Driven Layouts
steps.description: Connect your logic to the UI by implementing state-driven layouts that automatically adjust based on user authentication and data availability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a layout wrapper that handles logged-in vs logged-out states using Antigravity layout patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create layout wrapper with conditional rendering for auth states' --file ./app/layout.tsx

steps.title: Automate Responsive Refinement
steps.description: Audit your layout across breakpoints to ensure that the Antigravity design system is scaling correctly on mobile, tablet, and desktop.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit all generated components for responsive design flaws and apply Antigravity best practices for mobile-first scaling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Review all components for responsive layout issues and fix using Tailwind classes'

steps.title: Production Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Finalize the build process and optimize the asset pipeline for lightning-fast load times and SEO perfection.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the production build pipeline to optimize images, minify CSS, and generate Open Graph meta tags for all routes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Set up production build script and SEO meta-tag injection'

pro_tips: Always force a 'System Design Document' at the start of your Claude Code session to keep the AI aligned with your specific style guide.
Use 'dry-run' flags in your deployment scripts to catch CSS specificity conflicts before they hit the browser.
Inject your client's brand color palette into the Antigravity global config file immediately to instantly personalize the generic template.
Leverage Claude Code's ability to read your entire codebase by pointing it to the root directory for context-aware UI refinements.
Treat your UI components as 'immutable'—if a design needs a change, update the base component rather than overriding styles in the instance.
content.next_steps: Begin by deploying your base template to Vercel or Netlify. Once live, iterate on the feature set by using Claude Code to add database integrations like Supabase or Firebase.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting design friction stall your shipping velocity. Leverage the Antigravity ecosystem to transform your freelance workflow into a high-output machine. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
